name: keypicker-preferred-names
note: S-KEYPICKER-PREFERRED (operator UAT 2026-07-10: 'key selector drift - shows sharps only. SSOT'): every key selector displays preferred key names from the ONE provider (Circle.preferredTonicName) - the Compose root grid reads Db/Eb/Ab/Bb, and picking one shows the SAME name on the compact chip (no more 'C# selected, Db displays'). Tokens stay canonical underneath. Resolves IV-2.

steps.label: root grid shows preferred key names (Db/Eb/Ab/Bb/F#), no sharp-only C#/D#/G#/A#
picking Bb shows Bb on the compact chip (picker and chip agree)
key readout heading reads Bb Major, never A# (every layer agrees)
